content:
CALL TRANSCRIPT
Customer: Crestline Manufacturing
Customer ID: C004
Contract ID: K004
Account Executive: Tom Rivera
Call Type: Renewal Discussion
Date: March 18, 2024
Participants: Tom Rivera (AE), Dale Pruitt (Operations Manager), CFO voice only — name not provided

Tom Rivera: Dale, thanks for making time. I know we've had a few conversations about adoption and I wanted to address the renewal directly.

Dale Pruitt: Tom, I'll be upfront. We talked to our CFO before this call and we've made a decision not to renew. The adoption just never took hold and with the capital equipment spend we made this year, we're trimming SaaS costs.

Tom Rivera: I understand, Dale. I appreciate you letting me know directly. Can I ask — is there anything we could have done differently from a product or support standpoint?

Dale Pruitt: Honestly, I think it's a fit issue more than anything. Our managers need something purpose-built for manufacturing scheduling and inventory. DataSync Pro is a solid tool but it's not that. We're going back to using our ERP for most of this and spreadsheets for the rest.

Tom Rivera: That's fair. I offered a discount to retain the account — 15 percent, down to roughly $5,500 — but I understand if the decision is final.

Dale Pruitt: We appreciate the offer but the decision is made. No hard feelings on our end.

Tom Rivera: None on ours either. I'll make sure the offboarding is smooth. Let me know if you ever revisit your tooling needs.
